title: At the Ceremony
scene: 你作为宾客参加户外婚礼仪式。

turns.cn: 欢迎！请柬在吗？新娘还是新郎那边？
turns.en: Welcome! May I see your invitation? Bride or groom's side?

turns.cn: 在这，我是新郎的大学同学。
turns.en: Here. I'm a college friend of the groom.

turns.cn: 请坐右边第三排，仪式马上开始。
turns.en: Right side, third row. Ceremony starts shortly.

turns.cn: 可以拍照吗？
turns.en: Are photos allowed?

turns.cn: 仪式中请收起手机，之后随意。
turns.en: Please put phones away during vows. After that, go ahead.

turns.cn: 下雨有备用方案吗？
turns.en: Is there a rain plan?

turns.cn: 十分钟后转室内宴会厅。
turns.en: We move to the ballroom in ten minutes if needed.

title: Reception Seating
scene: 婚宴开始，你在签到台找座位。

turns.cn: 姓名？我帮您查桌号。
turns.en: Your name? I'll find your table.

turns.cn: 张伟，一位。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, party of one.

turns.cn: 七号桌，靠舞池。胸花请别在胸前。
turns.en: Table seven by the dance floor. Please pin on your boutonniere.

turns.cn: 有素食选项吗？
turns.en: Is there a vegetarian option?

turns.cn: 有的，上菜时跟服务员说。
turns.en: Yes. Tell the server when they take orders.

turns.cn: 礼物放哪？
turns.en: Where do I put the gift?

turns.cn: 入口那张礼物桌。
turns.en: The gift table by the entrance.

title: Wedding Toast
scene: 朋友请你帮忙在婚宴上简短祝酒。

turns.cn: 愿意祝酒吗？一两分钟就行。
turns.en: Would you give a toast? Just a minute or two.

turns.cn: 可以，我说中英混合行吗？
turns.en: Sure. Is it okay if I mix in a little Chinese?

turns.cn: 当然，新人会喜欢。九点切蛋糕前。
turns.en: Of course. They'd love it. Right before cake at nine.

turns.cn: 需要提前把稿子给你看吗？
turns.en: Should I send you the script beforehand?

turns.cn: 不用，轻松幽默就好，别太长。
turns.en: No need. Keep it light and short.

turns.cn: 好，我准备了几个大学趣事。
turns.en: Got it. I have a few college stories ready.

turns.cn: 太感谢了！
turns.en: You're the best!

title: Wedding Dance Floor
scene: 婚宴上有人邀请你跳舞。

turns.cn: 来跳一支？新娘马上要抛花球了。
turns.en: Care for a dance? Bouquet toss is coming up.

turns.cn: 我不太会跳，慢舞可以吗？
turns.en: I'm not great at dancing. Slow song okay?

turns.cn: 当然，这首很合适。
turns.en: Sure. This one's perfect.

turns.cn: 你们怎么认识新人的？
turns.en: How do you know the couple?

turns.cn: 新娘是我表妹，你呢？
turns.en: The bride is my cousin. You?

turns.cn: 新郎同事，一起做过项目。
turns.en: I work with the groom. We were on a project together.

turns.cn: 很浪漫的婚礼，对吧？
turns.en: Lovely wedding, isn't it?

title: Leaving the Reception
scene: 婚宴结束，你跟新人告别。

turns.cn: 今晚太棒了，祝你们幸福！
turns.en: Tonight was wonderful. Congratulations and best wishes!

turns.cn: 谢谢赶来！礼物我们很喜欢。
turns.en: Thanks for coming! We love the gift.

turns.cn: 蜜月去哪？什么时候出发？
turns.en: Where's the honeymoon? When do you leave?

turns.cn: 下周去夏威夷，五天。
turns.en: Hawaii next week for five days.

turns.cn: 我帮你们叫网约车吗？
turns.en: Want me to call you a ride?

turns.cn: 不用，酒店有车，再次感谢！
turns.en: We're good. The hotel has a shuttle. Thanks again!

turns.cn: 晚安，享受蜜月！
turns.en: Good night. Enjoy the honeymoon!
